text: Here's what science actually says about the open science movement. The open science movement aims to make research accessible to everyone. Imagine sharing your findings with the world, free from paywalls. Studies show that open science boosts collaboration and innovation! But not all research is ready for public eyes; some is still preliminary. The movement could redefine how we view knowledge—open for all. Curious about how this affects you? Follow for more insights!
